hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Villa Diva in Budureasa offers a 3-star villa with spa facilities, sauna, sun terrace, bar, and free WiFi. Guests enjoy garden and mountain views, private bathrooms, and modern amenities.
Relaxing Amenities: The property features a lounge, hot tub, outdoor seating area, and free on-site private parking. Additional amenities include bathrobes, slippers, TV, and a work desk.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental buffet breakfast with local specialities, warm dishes, and cheese is served daily. Guests appreciate the variety and quality of the morning meal.
Convenient Location: Located 76 km from Oradea International Airport, Villa Diva is highly rated for its attentive staff, convenient location, and excellent breakfast.
